name: Suncorp Group Limited
analysis: SUN's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 12% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Price has broken above the base high at A$18.8650. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$19.0700, stop A$17.6517, target A$23.3249 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
